message:
feat(tests): add critical Node.js API test modules

Added 26 new tests across 5 critical modules:
- Stream (10 tests): Readable, Writable, Transform, pipe, pipeline, etc.
- Child Process (5 tests): exec, execSync, spawn, spawnSync, fork
- Console (3 tests): log, error, warn
- Assert (5 tests): strictEqual, deepStrictEqual, throws, doesNotThrow, ok
- OS (3 tests): platform, arch, cpus

Updated CI to run all 13 modules in parallel (was 8).

Total coverage: 84 tests across 13 modules (~43% of Node.js core APIs)

Note: Tests prefer WASM over AOT for stability

files.patch:
@@ -40,7 +40,7 @@ jobs:
     strategy:
       fail-fast: false
       matrix:
-        module: [buffer, fs, path, crypto, util, process, events, timers]
+        module: [buffer, fs, path, crypto, util, process, events, timers, stream, child_process, console, assert, os]
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
